brief_notes: Outstanding paper. All values verified: N=20 (60 scans), n=31 HC, 1.2%, F(2,38)=9.71 P=0.0004, eta^2=0.34, low/medium/high perceived (3.52, 4.52, 5.82), intake (0.928/0.719/0.783), thalamus (0.157/0.601/2.914), HC 2.318, F(2,38)=3.62 P=0.036, decoding 49.3% vs 33.3%, Spearman 0.27 P=0.035, NAcc 1.228/1.248/1.016, all ANOVA stats, P_FWE=0.006 k=50, PPI P=0.041. Extensive named citations, thoughtful discussion reconciling striatum null with prior work.
